critical.title: Zero Test Coverage - No Tests Exist
critical.description: The application has NO unit tests, integration tests, or E2E tests. No testing infrastructure is configured.
reproduction_steps: 3. Verify no Jest, Vitest, or testing library configuration
critical.expected_behavior: Application should have comprehensive test coverage with unit, integration, and E2E tests.
critical.actual_behavior: Zero tests exist. No testing framework configured.
critical.impact: CRITICAL - No way to verify functionality, prevent regressions, or ensure code quality. Deployment is risky.
critical.suggested_fix: Set up Vitest + React Testing Library. Add unit tests for components, integration tests for user flows, and Playwright for E2E tests.

high.title: Non-Functional Forms - No Submit Handlers
high.description: Found 3 form(s) without proper submission handlers. Forms cannot send data anywhere.
high.expected_behavior: Forms should submit data to backend API endpoints and show confirmation messages.
high.actual_behavior: Forms have no submit handlers or only preventDefault() with no actual submission logic.
high.impact: HIGH - Users cannot contact the business, request services, or submit reviews.
high.suggested_fix: Implement form submission handlers that POST data to backend API endpoints. Add validation and user feedback.

high.title: Missing Input Validation and Sanitization
high.description: Forms lack input validation and sanitization, creating potential security vulnerabilities.
reproduction_steps: 1. Check form components for validation logic
2. Verify no validation schema (Yup, Zod) exists
3. Check for XSS protection beyond React's default
high.expected_behavior: All user inputs should be validated, sanitized, and protected against XSS/injection attacks.
high.actual_behavior: No validation libraries or input sanitization implemented.
high.impact: HIGH - Potential XSS vulnerabilities, data integrity issues, poor UX.
high.suggested_fix: Implement form validation using Zod or Yup. Add input sanitization. Use controlled components with validation state.

medium.title: Improper Navigation - Using window.location Instead of React Router
medium.description: Found usage of window.location.href for navigation which breaks React Router's SPA behavior.
reproduction_steps: 3. This causes full page reload instead of SPA navigation
medium.expected_behavior: Should use React Router's useNavigate() hook for client-side navigation.
medium.actual_behavior: Uses window.location.href which causes full page reload.
medium.impact: MEDIUM - Breaks SPA behavior, causes unnecessary page reloads, loses React state.
medium.suggested_fix: Replace window.location.href with useNavigate() from react-router-dom.

medium.title: Duplicate Product Data - No Single Source of Truth
medium.description: Product data is duplicated in Shop.tsx and FeaturedProducts.tsx. Changes must be made in multiple places.
reproduction_steps: 1. Open src/pages/Shop.tsx and check products array
2. Open src/components/home/FeaturedProducts.tsx and check products array
medium.expected_behavior: Product data should come from a single source (API or data file).
medium.actual_behavior: Products are hardcoded in multiple components with no synchronization.
medium.impact: MEDIUM - Data inconsistency, maintenance burden, risk of divergence.
medium.suggested_fix: Create a shared products data file or fetch from API. Use single source of truth.

medium.title: Hardcoded Data in Components - Should Use API
medium.description: All data (products, reviews, carousel slides) is hardcoded in components instead of fetched from API.
reproduction_steps: 1. Check Shop.tsx for hardcoded products array
2. Check Reviews.tsx for hardcoded reviews array
3. Check HeroCarousel.tsx for hardcoded slides array
4. Note no API fetch calls exist
medium.expected_behavior: Data should be fetched from backend API for dynamic content management.
medium.actual_behavior: All data is hardcoded in component files.
medium.impact: MEDIUM - Cannot update content without code deployment. No content management system.
medium.suggested_fix: Create API endpoints for products, reviews, and content. Use useEffect + fetch/axios to load data dynamically.

medium.title: Generic Page Title - Poor SEO
medium.description: index.html has generic 'Vite + React + TS' title instead of business name.
medium.expected_behavior: Title should be 'DelightfulGroup.africa - Professional Cleaning & Landscaping Services'
medium.impact: MEDIUM - Poor SEO, unprofessional appearance, low search rankings.
medium.suggested_fix: Update title and add proper meta description, Open Graph tags, and structured data.

medium.title: Missing Meta Description
medium.description: No meta description tag for SEO.
medium.expected_behavior: Should have descriptive meta description for search engines.
medium.impact: MEDIUM - Reduced search engine visibility and click-through rates.
medium.suggested_fix: Add comprehensive meta tags including description, keywords, Open Graph, and Twitter cards.

medium.title: Accessibility Improvements Needed
medium.description: Application needs accessibility enhancements for WCAG compliance.
reproduction_steps: 2. Check for missing alt text on images
medium.expected_behavior: Should meet WCAG 2.1 Level AA standards for accessibility.
medium.actual_behavior: Some accessibility features missing or incomplete.
medium.impact: MEDIUM - Excludes users with disabilities, potential legal compliance issues.
medium.suggested_fix: Add skip links, improve ARIA labels, ensure keyboard navigation, verify color contrast, add alt text to all images.

medium.title: Unoptimized External Images - Performance Impact
medium.description: Application loads large unoptimized images from Unsplash CDN without size optimization or lazy loading.
reproduction_steps: 3. Observe large image downloads from Unsplash
4. Note no lazy loading or responsive images
medium.expected_behavior: Images should be optimized, resized appropriately, and lazy-loaded.
medium.actual_behavior: Full-size external images loaded eagerly without optimization.
medium.impact: MEDIUM - Slow page loads, high bandwidth usage, poor mobile experience.
medium.suggested_fix: Implement image optimization, use responsive images, add lazy loading, consider using image CDN with automatic optimization.

low.title: Deprecated ESLint Version
low.description: Using ESLint v8 which is no longer supported. Should upgrade to v9.
reproduction_steps: 3. Check ESLint website for version support status
low.expected_behavior: Should use latest supported ESLint version (v9+).
low.impact: LOW - Security updates and bug fixes no longer provided.
low.suggested_fix: Upgrade to ESLint v9 with new flat config format.

low.title: Linting Warnings Need Resolution
low.description: Found 5 ESLint warnings that should be fixed.
reproduction_steps: 3. Review warnings for unused imports and hooks dependencies
low.expected_behavior: Code should pass linting without warnings.
low.impact: LOW - Code quality and maintainability concerns.
low.suggested_fix: Fix unused imports, resolve React hooks dependencies warnings.
